column1: # ZAP Baseline scan rule overrides — SEC-7
#   WARN    — downgrade to warning (does not fail the build)
# Add entries here to triage noisy false positives. Keep a justification
# in the comment column so reviewers can audit later.
# Curated base set — known-noisy rules on API-only surfaces (no HTML):

column4: Incomplete or No Cache-control — APIs return JSON, browser caching not applicable
Information Disclosure — Suspicious Comments (false positives on minified JSON)
Timestamp Disclosure — Unix times are valid payload content, not a leak
Storable and Cacheable Content — duplicate of 10015 for our surface
